title: InstCombine: Fix SimplifyDemandedFPClass bug with known-snan sources
author: arsenm
description: If the result can be a qnan, the source can be a signaling nan.

tests.test_body:
declare nofpclass(qnan inf zero sub norm) half @returns_snan()

define nofpclass(snan) half @qnan_result_self_demands_snan(i1 noundef %cond, half noundef %unknown) {
  %snan = call noundef half @returns_snan()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %snan, half %unknown
  %result = fadd half %select, %select
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(qnan inf zero sub norm) half @returns_snan()

define nofpclass(snan) half @qnan_result_demands_snan_src_lhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %snan = call half @returns_snan()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %snan, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %select, %unknown1
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(qnan inf zero sub norm) half @returns_snan()

define nofpclass(snan) half @qnan_result_demands_snan_src_rhs(i1 %cond, half %unknown0, half %unknown1) {
  %snan = call half @returns_snan()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %snan, half %unknown0
  %div = fdiv half %unknown1, %select
  ret half %div
}

declare nofpclass(qnan inf zero sub norm) float @returns_snan()

define nofpclass(snan) float @qnan_result_demands_snan_rhs(i1 %cond, float %unknown0, float %unknown1) {
  %snan = call float @returns_snan()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %snan, float %unknown0
  %mul = fmul float %unknown1, %select
  ret float %mul
}

declare nofpclass(qnan inf zero sub norm) float @returns_snan()

define nofpclass(snan) float @qnan_result_demands_snan_lhs(i1 %cond, float %unknown0, float %unknown1) {
  %snan = call float @returns_snan()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %snan, float %unknown0
  %mul = fmul float %select, %unknown1
  ret float %mul
}

declare nofpclass(qnan inf zero sub norm) float @returns_snan()

define nofpclass(snan) float @qnan_result_square_demands_snan(i1 noundef %cond, float noundef %unknown0) {
  %snan = call noundef float @returns_snan()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %snan, float %unknown0
  %mul = fmul float %select, %select
  ret float %mul
}

declare nofpclass(qnan inf zero sub norm) half @returns_snan_f16()

define nofpclass(snan) float @qnan_result_demands_snan_src(i1 %cond, half %unknown) {
  %snan = call half @returns_snan_f16()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %snan, half %unknown
  %result = fpext half %select to float
  ret float %result
}

declare nofpclass(qnan inf zero sub norm) float @returns_snan_f32()

define nofpclass(snan) half @qnan_result_demands_snan_src2(i1 %cond, float %unknown0) {
  %snan = call float @returns_snan_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %snan, float %unknown0
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}
